# @runloop/remote-agents-sdk

Index for generating code that uses the SDK to connect to Runloop-hosted remote agents.

## Install

```bash
npm install @runloop/remote-agents-sdk @runloop/api-client
# Claude module only:
npm install @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk
```

## Connecting

Refer to ../scaffold.ts for setup and advice on best practices.

## Use Cases

- [agent-via-blueprint](https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/examples/feature-examples/src/use-cases/agent-via-blueprint.ts) — Use pre-built blueprint with agents baked in (acp + claude)
- [elicitation-acp](https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/examples/feature-examples/src/use-cases/elicitation-acp.ts) — Handle agent-initiated user input via ACP session_elicitation (acp)
- [elicitation-claude](https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/examples/feature-examples/src/use-cases/elicitation-claude.ts) — Handle agent-initiated user input via Claude conversational flow (claude)
- [single-prompt](https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/examples/feature-examples/src/use-cases/single-prompt.ts) — Send one prompt, receive text response (acp + claude)

## Compatibility

Not every agent supports every protocol or feature. See the compatibility matrix before assuming a combination works:
https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/examples/feature-examples/compatibility.md

## Implementation Notes

- Call `connect()` before `initialize()`.
- Use SDK type guards instead of raw Axon payloads.
- Prefer Agent Gateway for secrets; MCP Gateway for MCP endpoints; Network Policy for egress.
- Node >= 22 required.

## References

- SDK README: https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/sdk/README.md
- SDK agent guide: https://github.com/runloopai/remote-agents-sdk/blob/main/sdk/AGENTS.md
- Runloop docs: https://docs.runloop.ai
- API client: https://github.com/runloopai/api-client-ts
